title: Hopper Filter
description: Hopper filter mod based on Pepsied's Easy Multi Item Sorter
body:
### Credit
Hopper filter mod based on [Pepsied](https://modrinth.com/user/DEcVzOAU)'s [Easy Multi Item Sorter](https://modrinth.com/project/cfW1jJT7) datapack.

I added an "Filter" item to use inside item frame instead of redstone comparator. Filter item doesnt have any function other than being used for this.

### How to craft Filter
just like crafting a hopper but instead of chest we use paper to create a filter


![filter crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a02fac74fd35d914feab7df96dcc81f054c834f3.png)


#### ![shorter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22bac0a0142d8c9e2492944d0556de04a03f8209.png)


you can look at [Pepsied](https://modrinth.com/user/DEcVzOAU)'s [Easy Multi Item Sorter](https://modrinth.com/project/cfW1jJT7) datapack for more information.
